components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3F7D78; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Subject Card
components.html:
Lesson 12 of 18
Calculus II
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FBF8F1; border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid #E0D8C6; padding: 16px; width: 200px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #DDE9E6; color: #2E5F5B; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #1F1C16; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-prog-track { height: 6px; background: #EAE3D4; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-prog-fill { height: 100%; width: 68%; background: #3F7D78; border-radius: 999px; }

narrative.overview: NA-Academy is designed to be a calm, focused place for deep study. It rejects the clinical, high-density interfaces of traditional administrative tools in favor of a warm, archival aesthetic.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary Sage-Teal is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

dos: Do use Fraunces for screen titles
donts: Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#FFF)
